name: Jubayer Hossain
title: Senior Web Developer
bio: Jubayer Hossain is a senior web developer who specializes in building modern full-stack applications using React, Next.js, Node.js, and databases.

name: Sarah Ali
title: UI/UX Designer
bio: Sarah Ali helps students understand user-centered design, wireframing, prototyping, visual design, and design systems for modern digital products.

title: Data Scientist
bio: Maria Akter teaches data analysis, Python programming, data visualization, and practical machine learning using real-world datasets.

bio: Ema Dash is a digital marketing specialist who teaches SEO, content planning, social media strategy, campaign management, and analytics.
